admin_login_sub: Sign in to manage your Law Office System
sign_in_sub: Sign in to your Law Office System
by_logging_in: By logging in, you agree to our
hero_description: Created by lawyers, for lawyers. Quick case creation, smart calendar, powerful AI court practice search, and clean organization — all in one place.
get_started_sub: Get started with your law office management system
otp_desc: We have sent a 6-digit verification code to your email address. Please enter the code below to complete your registration.
verification_success_desc: Your identity has been confirmed. Welcome to the law office system interface.
verification_failed_desc: The OTP you supplied does not match our parameters or has expired.
forgot_password_desc: No problem. Enter your registered email address and we'll send you 6 digit verification code to reset your password.
reset_password_desc: You are ready to go. Setup your new password.
password_reset_success_desc: You can now use your new password to access your account.
something_went_wrong_desc: Verification failed. Please check the code or resend it.
